author: Alex S
subject: v2.6.2
body: ## [2.6.2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.6.1...v2.6.2) (2018-03-29) ### Bug Fixes * **connectGeoSearch:** correctly dispose the connector ([#2845](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2845)) ([a4eafd2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/a4eafd2)) * **GeoSearch:** correctly unmount the widget ([#2846](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2846)) ([f31ef3c](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f31ef3c))
